images.quality_assessment: Image portfolio is extensive with 76 total images, but alt_text quality is weak. Primary alt texts are generic ('Image 2', 'Image 3', etc.) rather than descriptive. Only 20 alt_texts are captured, suggesting incomplete optimization. Includes some contextual images (map, icons, competing deals) but lacks specific descriptive alt text for product/service photos needed for accessibility and SEO.

reviews.text: Great customer service and quick. I am very happy with the results
reviews.author: Jose

reviews.text: Very good and quick service was provided
reviews.author: Muruganandam

reviews.text: This is a great deal. I wish we were allowed to get this discount as often as we would like to. One of the employees told me there's a two times a year limit.
reviews.author: Laura
